message:
feat: add bd find-duplicates for AI-powered duplicate detection (bd-581b80b3)

Adds semantic duplicate detection that goes beyond exact content matching.
Two methods: mechanical (token-based Jaccard+cosine similarity, default)
and AI (LLM-based via Claude API with mechanical pre-filtering).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
